metadata.title: BugSense — The Lab in Your Hands | Point-of-Care UTI Diagnostics
metadata.description: BugSense delivers complete microbiological UTI diagnostics — pathogen ID, bacterial load, and antibiotic resistance — at the point of care, in 12 hours, on paper. Clinically validated with 100% sensitivity.
metadata.ogTitle: BugSense — The Lab in Your Hands
metadata.ogDescription: Complete UTI diagnostics at the point of care. Pathogen ID, bacterial load, and antibiotic resistance in 12 hours. Clinically validated, peer-reviewed.
metadata.twitterTitle: BugSense — The Lab in Your Hands
metadata.twitterDescription: Complete UTI diagnostics at the point of care in 12 hours. 100% sensitivity. Peer-reviewed.
metadata.keywords: UTI diagnostics, point of care testing, antibiotic resistance, rapid diagnostics, BugSense, urinary tract infection, antimicrobial resistance, clinical microbiology, POCT, paper-based diagnostics

hero.descriptionSuffix: . Clinicians prescribe empirically and get it wrong up to 50% of the time. BugSense delivers complete microbiological diagnostics — pathogen ID, bacterial load, and antibiotic resistance — at the point of care, in 12 hours, on paper.

problem.label: The problem
problem.description: Culture-based diagnostics take 2–4 days. By then, the prescription is already written — and up to half the time, it’s wrong. The result: failed treatments, more resistant bacteria, and avoidable healthcare costs.
problem.stat1Desc: Average wait for a laboratory culture result — if the sample even arrives on time
problem.stat2Desc: Of UTI prescriptions use the wrong antibiotic due to empirical treatment without culture data
problem.stat3Desc: Extra cost per complicated hospital UTI case caused by treatment failure and extended stay
problem.additional1Desc: Average logistics time for a blood culture sample from collection to result — often longer than the test itself
problem.additional2Desc: Of urine samples sent to central labs come back unremarkable — a majority of shipments produce no actionable result
problem.callout: The technology to do better has always existed — it was just locked inside a central laboratory. BugSense moves it to the point of care.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: Point. Shoot. Diagnose.
howItWorks.description: No lab, no sample preparation, no specialist required. A clinic nurse can run BugSense. A smartphone reads it. Results arrive while the patient is still reachable.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Direct application to paper cassette. No sample prep. No centrifuge. No lab equipment.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Compact mini-incubator maintains 37°C automatically. Fully hands-free. Fits on any desk.
howItWorks.step3Desc: After 4–12 hours of incubation, scan the cassette with the BugSense app. AI-supported kinetics read colorimetric growth signals and generate the result.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Infection status, pathogen ID, bacterial load, resistance profile (EUCAST S/I/R). Exportable.

validation.label: Peer-reviewed evidence
validation.citationText: Rapid direct disk diffusion testing for antibiotic resistance in urinary tract infections: a bacterial concentration-adjusted approach.

comparison.label: Technology comparison
comparison.footnote: * Dipstick confirms leukocytes — not pathogen or resistance. ~ = partial capability depending on device/configuration.

benefits.label: Who benefits
benefits.clinicsTitle: Same-day resistance data. Fewer empirical prescriptions.
benefits.clinicsBodyPrefix: Reduce antibiotic misuse, cut readmission risk, and save an average of
benefits.clinicsBodySuffix: — with actionable results before the patient leaves.
benefits.doctorsTitle: A diagnostic decision by end of day — not day 4.
benefits.doctorsBody: Billable as an in-house laboratory service (IGeL). Prescribe with confidence. No more chasing the lab or starting empirical treatment and hoping for the best.
benefits.pharmaciesTitle: A new, differentiated health service for walk-in patients.
benefits.pharmaciesBody: No lab send-out required. Results same day. A compelling reason to return — and to choose your pharmacy over online alternatives.
benefits.patientsTitle: The right antibiotic. The first time.
benefits.patientsBodyPrefix: No 4-day wait. No second failed prescription.
benefits.patientsBodyHighlight: 1 in 2 UTI patients today is treated with the wrong drug

about.label: About BugSense
about.paragraph1: BugSense was founded to solve a problem that has persisted for decades: doctors treating UTIs cannot access microbiological culture data at the point where the prescribing decision is made.
about.paragraph2Prefix: We built a paper-based platform that replicates the essential steps of clinical microbiology — filtration, incubation, colorimetric detection, and antibiotic susceptibility testing — without a laboratory. Born from research at
about.milestone2023: GO-Bio funded · m⁴ Award · Patent filed

advisors.wantiaRole: Head of Clinical Microbiology, MRI Munich

cta.title: Ready to work together?
cta.description: We're running clinical pilots, building investor relationships, and exploring strategic partnerships.
cta.runPilotDesc: Evaluate BugSense in your clinic or hospital. No commitment. Full onboarding support.
cta.requestMaterialsDesc: Download our investor deck or schedule a call directly with the founding team.
cta.explorePartnershipDesc: Distribution, co-development, or integration. Let’s explore what makes sense together.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. We treat your personal data confidentially and in accordance with the statutory data protection regulations and this privacy policy. The use of our website is generally possible without providing personal data.
privacy.responsible: The responsible party for data processing on this website is:
privacy.responsibleEntity:
BugSense GmbH (in Gründung)
Center of Translational Cancer Research
Einsteinstr. 25
81675 Munich, Germany
Email: contact@bugsensedx.com
privacy.serverLogs: The hosting provider of our pages automatically collects and stores information in so-called server log files, which your browser automatically transmits to us. These are: browser type and version, operating system, referrer URL, hostname of the accessing computer, and time of the server request. This data cannot be attributed to specific persons. This data is not merged with other data sources. The basis for data processing is Art. 6 (1) (f) GDPR, which permits the processing of data for the fulfillment of a contract or pre-contractual measures.
privacy.contactForm: If you contact us by email, your inquiry including all resulting personal data (name, inquiry) will be stored and processed by us for the purpose of handling your request. We will not share this data without your consent. The processing of the data entered in the contact email is based exclusively on your consent (Art. 6 (1) (a) GDPR).
privacy.cookies: Our website currently uses only technically necessary cookies that are essential for the functionality of the website. These cookies do not collect personal data and are automatically deleted when you close your browser. No analytics or marketing cookies are used at this time.
privacy.rights: You have the right to: request information about your stored personal data free of charge, request correction, blocking, or deletion of your data, withdraw consent for data processing at any time, lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. For inquiries regarding data protection, please contact us at contact@bugsensedx.com.
privacy.changes: We reserve the right to update this privacy policy to reflect changes in our practices or for other operational, legal, or regulatory reasons. The current version is always available on our website.

cookieConsent.title: We value your privacy
cookieConsent.description: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze site traffic. You can choose which cookies you allow. Only essential cookies are set by default.
cookieConsent.necessaryDesc: Required for the website to function. Cannot be disabled.
cookieConsent.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website.
cookieConsent.marketingDesc: Used to deliver relevant advertisements and track campaigns.
cookieConsent.devNote: No analytics or marketing tools are currently tracking non-essential user data
